name: Hamstrings
description: A group of muscles located at the back of the thigh, responsible for bending the knee and extending the hip.

name: Gastrocnemius
description: The main muscle of the calf, responsible for plantar flexing the foot and bending the knee.

name: Biceps
description: A muscle located in the upper arm, responsible for flexing the elbow.

name: Triceps
description: A muscle located at the back of the upper arm, responsible for extending the elbow.

name: Glutes
description: A group of muscles in the buttocks, responsible for hip extension, abduction, and rotation.

name: Rectus Abdominis
description: The muscle group known as the 'six-pack,' located in the abdomen, responsible for flexing the spine.

name: Obliques
description: Muscles located on the sides of the abdomen, responsible for rotating and bending the torso.

name: Pectoralis Major
description: The large muscle in the chest, responsible for the movement of the shoulder joint, such as pushing movements.

name: Deltoids
description: The shoulder muscles responsible for the abduction and rotation of the arm.

name: Soleus
description: A muscle in the calf, located beneath the gastrocnemius, responsible for plantar flexion of the foot.

name: Quadriceps
description: A group of muscles located at the front of the thigh, responsible for extending the knee.

name: Pectoralis Minor
description: A smaller chest muscle beneath the pectoralis major, responsible for stabilizing the scapula.

name: Latissimus Dorsi
description: The large muscle in the back, responsible for moving the arms, shoulders, and back.

name: Rotator Cuff
description: A group of muscles and tendons in the shoulder, responsible for stabilizing and rotating the shoulder joint.

name: Trapezius
description: A muscle extending from the neck to the mid-back, responsible for moving and stabilizing the shoulder blades.

name: Rhomboids
description: Muscles located between the shoulder blades, responsible for retracting the scapula.
